meaning: n.笔记本,钱袋,皮夹,经济来源
examples: The court has ruled that police don't violate the Fourth Amendment when they go through the wallet or pocketbook of an arrestee without a warrant.
He ate the roll and opened the pocketbook.
Someone grabbed her pocketbook off her shoulder, ripping her coat open.
So what can businesses do to help aid drivers during these dangerously pocketbook pinching times?
The camera will weigh under 5 pounds, but will weigh about 6 grand on your pocketbook.
